## Summary

Describe the change and its technical intent.

## Why This Change

Explain how this change improves the repository as a reusable reference implementation or template.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Structural improvement
- [ ] Example handler change
- [ ] CI/CD or deployment change
- [ ] Test update

## Validation

Describe how the change was validated.

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation is aligned with the current implementation
- [ ] The change preserves or improves template reusability
- [ ] No unsupported capabilities are implied by the update
- [ ] Tests were run when applicable
